faq.title: Answers before you process an image.

one.question: What technologies does PhotoTools use?
one.answer: PhotoTools uses server-side image processing, queue-ready jobs, cloud storage, and AI generation through connected providers when they are available.

two.question: Which file formats are supported?
two.answer: You can upload PNG, JPEG, and WebP images up to 10MB. Server-side validation also checks image dimensions before processing.

three.question: How do I remove a background?
three.answer: Open the background remover, upload an image, and start processing. PhotoTools sends the task through the processing layer and returns a downloadable result.

four.question: How fast does processing work?
four.answer: Processing time depends on image size and queue load. Small resize tasks usually finish quickly, while AI generation can take longer.

final.title: Start with the image task in front of you.
final.description: Resize assets, prepare PNG outputs, or generate new visual directions without leaving the PhotoTools workspace.
